description: Scripts (py/sh) that are never invoked by cron, deploy, governance, or other scripts.
unused_candidates: Root: RUN_DROPLET_VERIFICATION_NOW.py, EXECUTE_DROPLET_DEPLOYMENT_NOW.py, DEPLOY_WEIGHTS_FIX.py, FIX_*.py, COMPLETE_*.py, many CURSOR_*.sh that are one-off
scripts/CURSOR_* (one-off cursor-driven runs; not in cron)
scripts/run_phase2_audit_on_droplet.py (and similar run_*_on_droplet.py that are ad-hoc)
note: Unused does not mean delete — may be manual/diagnostic. Mark for deprecation or move to archive in cleanup proposal.
